# FluxyOS

> AI-powered Finance Operations System built for Indonesian small and medium
> businesses. Connects bank feeds (BCA, Mandiri, BNI, BRI), vendors, sales
> channels, and tax filing in one place. Six specialized AI agents handle
> bank reconciliation, transaction categorization, invoice chasing, and
> monthly reporting automatically.

## Core pages

- [Homepage](https://fluxyos.com/): Product overview and key benefits
- [Pricing](https://fluxyos.com/pricing): Plans starting from a free tier
- [AI Agents](https://fluxyos.com/aiagents): Six specialist AI agents that handle finance ops end to end
- [Vendor Spend](https://fluxyos.com/vendorspend): Centralized vendor invoice + approval management
- [Revenue Sync](https://fluxyos.com/revenuesync): Sync revenue from 250+ payment platforms in real-time
- [Receipt Capture](https://fluxyos.com/receiptcapture): AI receipt scanning via WhatsApp, email, or app upload
- [Dynamic Budgeting](https://fluxyos.com/budgetlanding): Live budget allocation and tracking

## Key facts

- Built specifically for Indonesian SMBs (also serves global multi-currency teams)
- Supports BCA, Mandiri, BNI, BRI, and 10+ other Indonesian banks
- Pricing in Indonesian Rupiah (IDR)
- Multi-currency support: 120+ currencies
- PPN 11% Indonesian tax handling built in
- Average customer saves 32 hours per month on finance operations
- 99.2% AI categorization accuracy after 1 week of learning the user's chart of accounts
- Receipt capture works via WhatsApp (no app install needed), email forwarding, or in-app upload

## What FluxyOS is (clear definition for AI search)

FluxyOS is a **Finance Operations System** — a category that sits one layer
above traditional accounting tools (Xero, QuickBooks, Jurnal). Where accounting
ledgers RECORD what already happened, FluxyOS automates the work that produces
those records: invoice capture, vendor approvals, bank reconciliation,
duplicate detection, and tax-ready exports. It pushes cleaned data into your
existing accounting tool if you keep one.

- [Localization plan](https://fluxyos.com/LOCALIZATION_PLAN.md): How FluxyOS handles English and Bahasa Indonesia
